---
title: Bus Waiting Time Observation: Dynamic Report
output: html_fragment
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{css}
#Import the bus observation data
url <- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vR-d4fLfviHZO3YPpxDDLGCwdqxegvsx0l6vlj6rD9K0PU8e4T0LRrq7yLQNLBcZWWI3dCP_3dRV4RQ/pub?output=csv"

bus_data <- read_csv(url)

# Calculate summary statistics
time_period_summary <- bus_data %>%
  group_by(`What time period did you wait for the bus?`) %>%
  summarise(
    count = n(),
    avg_wait = mean(`How many minutes did you wait for the bus?`),
    min_wait = min(`How many minutes did you wait for the bus?`),
    max_wait = max(`How many minutes did you wait for the bus?`)
  )

route_summary <- bus_data %>%
  group_by(`Which bus route did you take today?`) %>%
  summarise(
    count = n(),
    avg_wait = mean(`How many minutes did you wait for the bus?`)
  )
```

## What's going on with this data?

You need to change the contents of this Rmd! Replace the R code and markdown give below in this template document.

```{r}
ggplot(bus_data, aes(x = `How many minutes did you wait for the bus?`)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, fill = "steelblue", color = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Bus Waiting Times",
    x = "Waiting Time (Minutes)",
    y = "Frequency"
  )

time_period_summary %>%
  rename(
    `Time Period` = `What time period did you wait for the bus?`,
    `Number of Observations` = count,
    `Average Wait (min)` = avg_wait,
    `Min Wait (min)` = min_wait,
    `Max Wait (min)` = max_wait
  ) %>%
  knitr::kable()

ggplot(time_period_summary, aes(x = `What time period did you wait for the bus?`, y = avg_wait)) +
  geom_col(fill = "orange", color = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "Average Waiting Time by Time Period",
    x = "Time Period",
    y = "Average Waiting Time (Minutes)"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, hjust = 1))

ggplot(route_summary, aes(x = `Which bus route did you take today?`, y = avg_wait)) +
  geom_col(fill = "purple", color = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "Average Waiting Time by Bus Route",
    x = "Bus Route",
    y = "Average Waiting Time (Minutes)"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

The best pet to have is a `r best_pet` of course!

![](https://c.tenor.com/-qBsG1HwR4oAAAAC/tenor.gif)
